title: U.S. Attorney appointee fired by Trump challenges termination in suit
shortDescription: Roger Rogoff filed a lawsuit Tuesday in federal court against President Trump for his 'unlawful firing' from the position of U.S. Attorney.

title: Arizona primary could provide a midterms snapshot: Live results
shortDescription: Primary results are expected soon as battleground state Arizona hits the polls. Follow live updates.

title: Trump's approval ratings remain near record lows, new poll shows
shortDescription: President Trump’s polling woes continue as his approval rating struggled again in a new Economist/YouGov poll.

title: Trump admin pauses $1 billion in Medicaid payments to California, Minnesota
shortDescription: The Trump administration is pausing $1 billion in Medicaid payments to California and Minnesota over "suspected fraud and noncompliance."

title: What does Cobb County think of upcoming Trump visit? It's mixed reviews
shortDescription: President Trump will be visiting a Marietta, Georgia high school on Wednesday to talk about Trump Accounts. Community reacted with mixed messages.

title: Trump downplays China's election meddling days after primetime address
shortDescription: President Trump downplayed China's meddling in U.S. elections, five days after he accused China of "the largest compromise of election data in history."

title: Trump news on Canada tariffs, Iran and the new White House statue
shortDescription: President Donald Trump said tariffs would go into effect for Canada next month. Iran strikes continue. The White House has a new garden sculpture.

title: Trump says Canada tariffs not wildfire-related
shortDescription: President Trump clarifies tariffs on Canada are unrelated to wildfires and criticizes Canadian leadership for tough treatment of U.S. farmers.

title: Key takeaways from Trump, Lebanon president meeting
shortDescription: President Donald Trump met with Lebanese President Joseph Aoun to discuss a range of topics that included U.S. action on Iran's nuclear sites.

title: Trump trade advisor loses criminal appeal tied to Jan. 6 Capitol riot
shortDescription: White House trade adviser Peter Navarro lost an appeal over his criminal conviction for defying a subpoena tied to the Capitol riot on Jan. 6, 2021.

title: More than 6,600 noncitizens were registered to vote in New Jersey
shortDescription: More than 6,600 non-U.S. citizens were registered to vote in New Jersey in 2023 and 2024 because of a software glitch, Gov. Mikie Sherrill said.

title: Trump administration cheers controversial history display installation
shortDescription: The President's House, where George Washington lived and kept nine enslaved people, had been the subject of legal wrangling over its displays.

title: Republicans criticize Mamdani after Netanyahu arrest comments
shortDescription: many Republicans rebuked the idea of Netanyahu's possible arrest - including the president himself.

title: Trump's super PAC has $400M. How will he spend it?
shortDescription: Donald Trump's super PAC is sitting on as much money as six major Republican and Democratic campaign committees combined.

title: Troy Jackson expected to join Maine Senate race
shortDescription: As Graham Platner bows out, all eyes turn to Troy Jackson, a seasoned Maine politician preparing for a Senate bid.

title: Why is Trump putting tariffs on Canada? It isn't due to wildfires yet
shortDescription: President Donald Trump signed an executive order to impose new 50% tariffs on some Canadian goods. He is still considering tariffs for the wildfires.

title: Trump says new Air Force One sent for security upgrades
shortDescription: Trump says the new Air Force One gifted by Qatar will be sent out for upgrades for about a month to solve any security and defense concerns.

title: Trump height debate flares after FIFA clip
shortDescription: A FIFA clip, shared by the White House's Rapid Response account on X shows Rodri appearing taller than Trump although both are listed at 6'3."

title: Some Trump voters are unhappy. Will they stay home on election day? | The Excerpt
shortDescription: Some Trump voters are growing frustrated over food costs and health care. Could that dissatisfaction hurt Republicans in the midterms?

title: An Arizona race's big stakes for how votes are counted
shortDescription: Voting rights advocates closely watch Arizona's race for secretary of state, as lead candidate supports Trump's rejection of 2020 election results.

title: From Prince William to Rodri: Trump's height debate
shortDescription: A viral World Cup video reignited debate over Trump's height, with online sleuths comparing him to Spain's soccer star, Rodri and Prince William.

title: Darline Graham joins South Carolina Senate race
shortDescription: Sen. Darline Graham is launching a bid for her brother’s former South Carolina Senate seat after Trump endorsed her.
